description.value:
Receive Medication data TA building blocks for patient C. XXX_Brugge
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_medicatiegegevens_ontvangen_TA
Original description: TEST Medicatiegegevens TA Scenarioset 1
Receive Medication data TA resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '2115468')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '6947')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '19429')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1506773')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '26638')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '71587')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '202185')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '3891')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '61433')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1163094')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '52272')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '106275')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1029754')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '45624')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '92487')))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationDispense).where(category.coding.code = '422037009').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '1189921')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '10138')) and ((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '26603')))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '202185|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (ROTER APC TABLET)
Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1189921|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (CHLOORHEXIDINE DIGLUCONAAT CREME 1%)
Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1029754|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (FLIXOTIDE DISKUS INHPDR 100MCG 60DO)
Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1506773|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (LISINOPRIL SANDOZ TABLET 10MG)
Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '2115468|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (METOCLOPRAMIDE HCL ACCORD TABLET 10MG)
Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '1163094|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (PANTOZOL TABLET MSR 20MG)
